'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service''''' was the sixth story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics, and the first of the "[[Rise of Isard]]" arc. It ran from [[August 6]] to [[November 5]], [[1997]].
